offline_reproducer.prerequisite: The exact model snapshot must already exist at the immutable Hugging Face cache path.
offline_reproducer.command: XDG_CACHE_HOME=/private/tmp/iql-vllm-xdg-cache HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1 VLLM_NO_USAGE_STATS=1 VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING=0 /private/tmp/iql-vllm-v0.23.0/.venv/bin/python -c 'from vllm import LLM; revision="c2faa23d97931c5481999c382d79163b02c4793c"; snapshot="/Users/dylantirandaz/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--yujiepan--mixtral-tiny-random/snapshots/"+revision; LLM(model=snapshot, tokenizer=snapshot, trust_remote_code=False, dtype="float32", tensor_parallel_size=1, seed=271828, max_model_len=64, kv_cache_memory_bytes=67108864, enforce_eager=True, disable_log_stats=True)'

blocker.detail: Both vLLM V1 engine modes require a local socket during initialization. This managed sandbox denies Unix IPC and TCP bind operations, including loopback-style rendezvous setup.
blocker.approval_result: The approval reviewer rejected the unsandboxed offline command because the session usage limit was reached and explicitly prohibited a workaround or retry without user approval.
blocker.required_next_evidence: Run the offline reproducer in an environment permitted to bind local IPC/TCP sockets, then record completed weight loading and non-empty generated token IDs before promoting a vLLM CPU runtime.

limitations: This record proves a pinned native Apple-Silicon CPU build and import only.
Architecture resolution is not model-weight loading or inference.
No generated tokens, latency, throughput, memory, routing, or quality metric is reported.
No vLLM-Metal plugin was installed or used.
No Inkling Quant Lab runtime adapter, optional dependency extra, config, or support claim was added.
